entry.title: IDC N0003913D0013 (P00140) awarded to ENTERPRISE SERVICES LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
PEO EIS NGEN SERVICES - MODIFY SECTION 3.3.15 - FILE REMOVAL SERVICES IN ATTACHMENT 01: PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT (PWS) AND REPORT 208 - FILE REMOVAL SERVICES IN ATTACHMENT 13: NGEN SERVICE LEVEL REQUIREMENTS (SLR) METRICS IN THE EXISTING NGEN CONTRACT N00039-13-D-0013.
IGF::OT::IGF

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: YES - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS NETWORK MANAGEMENT

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
